summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Edegar Agostinho crowdfunding website. All core functionality working correctly including admin authentication, campaign management, payment integration, and frontend-backend integration.
passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@edegar.com / Edegar2026!)
All backend API endpoints (16/16 tests passed - 100% success rate)
Homepage loading with all sections (hero, marquee, campaigns, biography, gallery, newsletter)
Admin dashboard with all tabs (campaigns, gallery, biography, newsletter)
Campaign creation through admin interface with tiers and rewards
Campaign display on homepage as featured campaign
Campaign detail page with stats, tiers, and payment integration
Neo-brutalist design implementation with yellow (#FFDE00) primary color
